title: papaver glabrum
intro: Papaver glabrum, also known as the smooth poppy or white poppy, is a flowering plant species within the poppy family (Papaveraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of China and the Himalayas. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects due to its alkaloid content. The plant's health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as acting as an antispasmodic to ease muscle cramps and spasms. Papaver glabrum is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be made into a salve or infused oil for topical application.
